query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A landscape view showing layers of tree-covered hills receding toward a distant horizon beneath a band of clouds. Mist hangs over a body of water in the foreground, partially veiling the lower vegetation. The scene is rendered in monochrome purple and violet tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dreamlike landscape created with intentional soft focus and blur, showing layers of tree-covered hills receding toward a distant horizon beneath a band of clouds. Heavy mist hangs over a body of water in the foreground, partially veiling the lower vegetation. The image employs a muted, faded palette of washed-out monochrome purple and violet tones, with crushed midtones and extremely weak separation between light and dark that produce an oppressive, suffocating atmosphere across the entire frame.
